hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||(j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath);if(f)process.stdout.write(f);}catch(e){}})" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx --no-install prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
